javadoc_before:
/** * Base class for type token classes used both to contain information * and as keys for deserializers. *

* Instances can (only) be constructed by * com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.TypeFactory * (included in "jackson-databind") */
javadoc_after:
/** * Base class for type token classes used both to contain information * and as keys for deserializers. *

* Instances can (only) be constructed by * com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.TypeFactory. *

* Since 2.2 this implements {@link java.lang.reflect.Type} to allow * it to be pushed through interfaces that only expose that type. */
